PETITION FOR SPOUSAL PROPERTY
Off Calendar Oct-30-2019 Granted Per Written Order

PETITION FOR SPOUSAL PROPERTY
Off Calendar Oct-02-2019 Continued To Oct-30-19 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person.

The petition for spousal petition is continued to October 30, 2019 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. Appearance will be required or petition will go off calendar.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Clerk: S. Le. Deputy: C. Wu. Not reported.
